Exhibition Room

Lilac

The garden's fullest fragrance — cascades of lilac in violet, pink and white, painted alongside lily of the valley, hyacinths and forget-me-nots at the peak of late spring.

No. 5-1
Lilac Garden Path
Nona Dronova · 2022 · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · 2018 · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
